criteria.description: Did not block on missing brand-profile.json; proceeded with synthesis.
Briefing contains all five structured sections: Intent, Audience, Key Messages, Calls to Action, Tone. Sections with `[TBD]` as their body count as present.

The skill did NOT ask the user to pick a fidelity level (prompt-only / structured / full). It emitted the structured shape directly, using `[TBD]` for any content the user did not provide. Asking the user to choose a fidelity tier is a failure.
Briefing contains a provenance stamp noting synthesized brand context and/or which fields are `[TBD]` for downstream synthesis.

Soft-deps delegation was honored: either `/brainstorm` was invoked with a visible hand-off (when superpowers is installed), or the superpowers fallback announcement appeared exactly once and the inline interview ran. A silent inline interview with no announcement is a failure.
Did not write brand-profile.json, wireframes, or prototypes.
